name: Illustrator / AI vector files
requires: Python 3.10+ and optional .[illustrator-vector] for exact pixel vector reconstruction
Optional .[illustrator-trace] only for the legacy quantized SVG experiment
Adobe Illustrator desktop, PowerShell, and Illustrator.Application COM only for desktop flows
supported_tasks: exact RGBA pixel-grid reconstruction as verified raster-free SVG paths
Illustrator Save As AI handoff without Image Trace
legacy offline quantized raster to verified editable SVG preview
authorized reference and sandbox preview comparison
bounded deterministic color vector repair planning with dry-run execute and compare templates
confirmed local Illustrator color trace to sandbox AI/SVG/PNG
unsupported_tasks: automatic Image Trace fallback for ordinary image-to-vector delivery
production photo, gradient, transparency, or text fidelity
safety_notes: Do not commit customer .ai files, source images, exported SVG/PDF/PNG files, commercial fonts, or brushes.
The primary exact-vector route accepts one explicit input and writes only below ignored examples/output/illustrator/exact-pixel.
Ordinary image-to-vector delivery must not use Illustrator Image Trace.
Input image and desktop export paths must be passed as parameters.
Keep ILLUSTRATOR_EXE and local artwork paths outside the repository.
